name: First State Bank
description_short: Noble, OK's First State Bank branch at 102 N Main St serves local banking needs.
description_long:
First State Bank operates a branch at 102 N Main St in Noble, OK, serving as a key financial resource for the local community. This standalone facility is centrally located in Noble and provides essential banking services to residents and small business owners throughout the area. Specific hours of operation are not currently posted online, but you can visit the branch in person or contact the location directly to confirm available times.

The Noble branch offers a range of banking services including checking and savings accounts, deposits, withdrawals, and personal financial consultation with experienced staff. A direct phone line for this specific location is not currently published; however, you can visit the 102 N Main St branch during business hours to discuss your banking needs with our team.

Residents of Noble seeking convenient local banking will find First State Bank's Main Street location accessible and welcoming. Be sure to bring a valid ID when opening new accounts or conducting larger transactions. First State Bank is committed to meeting the financial needs of the Noble community through reliable service and local expertise.

diagnosis: First State Bank is best for customers in the Oklahoma region seeking traditional community banking services with local branch access. The main caveat is that their website is currently inaccessible, making it impossible to verify current product offerings, rates, fees, or the full scope of services available.
